name: Robo Jake the Dewott
description:
Formerly I was an organic Dewott, but due to realizing I wasn't enjoying where my life was going, I decided to convert myself into a robot and start over, roaming the world in search of people who need help! I strive to make the world a better place one interaction at a time!

(Icon art by Kaleidosium)
creator: Hedghog2234
